global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent sale message and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 sale on fresh favorites.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Left panel
elements.description: A rectangular panel with a light blue background, featuring three vertical slots.

elements.label: Middle panel
elements.description: A rectangular panel similar to the left, with a light blue background and three vertical slots.

elements.label: Right panel
elements.description: A rectangular panel with a light blue background, featuring three vertical slots.

elements.label: UGC badge
elements.description: A small circular badge with the text 'UGC' in white on a blue background.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating '2-for-1 tonight Fresh favorites nearby' on a light blue background.

elements.label: Sale headline
elements.description: Large bold text reading 'QuickFork SALE' in white on a blue background at the top.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Shop now' in white on a blue background at the bottom.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: Small text displaying the price '€9.99' in white on a blue background at the bottom.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small badge labeled 'UGC' in white on a blue background at the top left.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by the main offer text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
